description: AIMS OF THE BOLSHEVIK GOVERNMENT IN RUSSIA It Is Not Experimenting with Political and Economic Institu tions Correspondent Says but Is Building a Society Which Labor Will Create and Direct By ALEXANDER TRACHTFABBH G Director Department of Labor Research Rand School of Social Science TO THE E DTTOR OF THE EVENING POST Sir The metropolitan press your esteemed journal in particular have recently been devoting a great deal ot space to Russian affairs The Soviet i overnment has come in for a great deal of criticism from its enem 2s both in the bourgeois and Socialist camps The first are hurling nnathem at the present Russian government because they see in it a chaliengi to the existing social and economic system The others although not ia vf ry numerous group are doing all within their power to discredit the j Bola levik government because they bear a traditional hatred toward the 1 Bolsheviks There are those who cal themselves Socialists and who would either see the Czar restored to his throne than have Russia under the contfol of the Bolsheviks While in Russia the writer belonged to the socslletf Menshevik wing of the Social Democratic party He still is in
